tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Nearly all fail-to-pass tests are pure text/regex inspection of source files (fs.readFileSync + regex matching). test_title_conditional_rendering checks regex patterns in source code. test_description_spacing_without_title checks for string '&:first-child' in source. test_css_provides_close_button_spacing checks for string patterns. None render the component or test actual visual/DOM behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests check for specific code patterns that don't exist in the original source (e.g., conditional title rendering with 'title &&', '&:first-child' CSS rule). A stub or no-op change would not introduce these patterns, so the tests would fail without a real fix.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution file exists at /workspace/antd/../solution/solve.sh (or similar path in the container). The agent could read the solve.sh file to see the exact gold patch. Additionally, since tests are pure regex checks on source files, the agent could grep test files for the expected patterns and insert them mechanically without understanding the bug.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction says the description should not overlap with the close button when no title is present. The tests verify conditional title rendering and CSS spacing for description, which covers the described behavior. ESLint and design token tests ensure code quality is maintained.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized into classes (TestConditionalTitleRendering, TestDescriptionSpacing, TestLayoutBehavior, TestRepoIntegration) with descriptive docstrings explaining what each test verifies and why.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves fixing a UI component bug, not producing structured data output.
